name: Chicken Cacciatore I
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large ovenproof frying pan.
2. Clean and trim chicken, leaving the skin on. Add to the frying pan.
3. Preheat the oven to 175°C.
4. Add the vinegar and bring to a boil. Partially cover and lower the heat.
5. Add wine and sugar, return to boil, reduce heat, and partially cover.
6. Bake at 175°C for 15-20 minutes or until brown.
This recipe is one of my favorites. It was recommended by a very close friend. I usually use a white California Zinfandel wine. The dish is easy to prepare with no need to measure precisely.
